account.deleteErrorRecentLogin: 请退出后重新登录，然后再试一次。

tensesTab.introRest: 回答问题即可获得对应时态的公式、例句和常见错误。

timeline.title: 📊 时间轴 — 动作何时发生

row.present_simple: 重复或持续的动作 — 总是
row.present_perfect: 过去发生并与现在相关
row.present_perfect_continuous: 从过去开始并仍在继续
row.past_simple: 在特定过去时刻完成的动作
row.past_continuous: 过去持续进行的背景动作
row.past_perfect: 在另一过去事件之前已完成
row.past_perfect_continuous: 持续到过去某一时刻的动作
row.future_continuous: 将来某一时刻正在进行的动作
row.future_perfect: 在将来某时点之前将已完成

present.c2: 与现在的联系：经历 / 结果

present_now.q: 是长期状态还是此刻的过程？
present_now.c0: 长期状态（知道、喜欢、想要…）

present_perfect_branch.q: 强调持续时间还是事实本身？
present_perfect_branch.c0: 事实 / 结果 / 经历

past.c0: 已完成的动作（具体时间）
past.c1: 进行中的动作 / 背景

future.c0: 临时决定 / 承诺 / 预测
future.c1: 事先计划 / 有明显迹象
future.c3: 在将来某刻之前将完成

rule.testCategoryTitle: 复制整主题的测验提示

present_simple.desc: 经常性动作、习惯、事实和日程安排。
present_simple.ex1: The sun rises in the east.

present_continuous.desc: 此刻正在发生或暂时的情形，也可表示近期的具体安排。
present_continuous.m0: <s>I am knowing</s> → 状态动词一般不用进行时
present_continuous.m1: She is working usually → She usually works（习惯用一般现在时）

past_simple.desc: 过去已完成的动作，常伴有具体时间或隐含的时间点。
past_simple.m2: I have seen him yesterday → I saw him yesterday

past_continuous.desc: 过去某一时刻正在进行的动作；作为背景被另一动作打断。
past_continuous.ex0: I was reading when she called.
past_continuous.ex0tr: 她打电话时我正在看书。
past_continuous.ex1: While he was cooking, she was working.

present_perfect.desc: 过去发生但与现在相关；人生经历；与 for/since 的未完成时段。
present_perfect.ex0tr: 我把钥匙丢了（现在仍没找到）。
present_perfect.ex1: Have you ever been to Japan?
present_perfect.m0: I have seen him yesterday → I saw him yesterday
present_perfect.m2: I've lived here since five years → for five years

present_perfect_continuous.desc: 强调从过去开始的过程或持续时间。
present_perfect_continuous.ex0: I've been learning English for two years.
present_perfect_continuous.ex1: Why are you tired? — I've been running.
present_perfect_continuous.ex1tr: 你为什么累？——我一直在跑步。
present_perfect_continuous.m0: <s>I've been know</s> → 状态动词不用进行时
present_perfect_continuous.m1: I've been learning since two years → for two years

past_perfect.desc: 在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作。
past_perfect.ex0: When I arrived, she had already left.
past_perfect.ex0tr: 我到的时候她已经走了。
past_perfect.ex1: He had never seen snow before that winter.
past_perfect.ex1tr: 那个冬天之前他从没见过雪。
past_perfect.m0: When I arrived, she already left → she had already left
past_perfect.m1: He had never see → He had never seen

past_perfect_continuous.desc: 在过去某点之前动作持续了多久；说明原因或当时的结果。
past_perfect_continuous.ex0: She was exhausted — she'd been working all night.
past_perfect_continuous.ex0tr: 她筋疲力尽——整晚都在工作。
past_perfect_continuous.ex1: How long had you been waiting?
past_perfect_continuous.m0: She had been work → She had been working
past_perfect_continuous.m1: How long had you waiting? → had you been waiting

future_will.desc: 预测、临时决定、承诺、对将来的一般陈述。

future_going_to.desc: 事先打算或根据明显迹象作出的预测。
future_going_to.ex1: Look at those clouds — it's going to rain!
future_going_to.m0: She is going to does → She is going to do
future_going_to.m1: <s>I am going to will do</s> → 不要叠用两种将来形式

future_continuous.desc: 在将来某一时刻正在进行的动作。
future_continuous.ex0: This time tomorrow I'll be lying on the beach.
future_continuous.ex0tr: 明天这个时候我会躺在沙滩上。
future_continuous.ex1: Don't call at 8 — I'll be having dinner.
future_continuous.ex1tr: 八点别打电话——我在吃晚饭。

future_perfect.desc: 在将来某一时间点之前将会完成的动作。
future_perfect.ex1: By 2030 they will have built the bridge.
future_perfect.ex1tr: 到2030年他们会建好这座桥。
future_perfect.m0: By Friday I will finish → I will have finished
